infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: OrangeRide Driver needs your location to show you to nearby passengers and navigate to pickups.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: OrangeRide Driver needs your location in the background to track active jobs and keep passengers updated.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: OrangeRide Driver needs your location in the background to track active jobs.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: OrangeRide Driver needs camera access to upload your TfL compliance documents.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: OrangeRide Driver needs photo library access to upload your TfL compliance documents.
